implementation_summary.state_model: React state variables rather than an explicit finite-state machine
strong_transitions: scope changes clear validation, confirmation, execution, result selection, inspection, timestamp inspection, and loading result id
result inspection is generation-guarded and ignored when the returned result id no longer matches the requested result
zero selected matches disables validation and execution
weak_transitions: mode changes do not clear the prior interpreted plan
query edits do not clear prior interpreted plan
preset selection can coexist with unrelated natural-language text
Hermes readiness is shown in bootstrap but live model interpretation can still return HTTP 500

required_source_provenance_states.meaning: A stored reviewed recipe was loaded as a trusted recipe artifact.
The user selected a preset or Browse recipes path without model authorship.
required_source_provenance_states.must_not_claim: Hermes interpreted or authored the plan

required_source_provenance_states.meaning: Hermes selected a reviewed/saved recipe and the host loaded that recipe.
Hermes authored a new schema-valid plan from registered capabilities with a new plan hash.
Host deterministic fallback or repair produced the final safe decision.
The request cannot be measured with the current capability boundary.

states.visible_copy: Host tactical query workbench; no replay window selected
states.recovery_path: Choose Ask Hermes or Browse recipes, then interpret
states.risk: Initial page defaults to Browse recipes/manual even while Ask Hermes is visually prominent.

states.recovery_path: No cancel control; wait for response or error banner
states.risk: No elapsed time or source-specific explanation; model mode failures surface as a generic error.

states.primary_action: answer clarification in query box and interpret again
states.recovery_path: Manual edit only; no structured clarification controls
states.risk: Clarification questions are shown but not connected to a guided answer flow.

states.recovery_path: Use supported recipe or measurable corridor language
states.risk: Manual fallback misses some unsupported synonyms such as scanning/body angle and can silently select the preset.

states.recovery_path: Change query, mode, preset, or scope and re-interpret
states.risk: Approved recipe, experimental template, and novel composition are not visually separated enough.
Two confirmation actions appear: Submit and validate plus Confirm interpretation.
Host confirmation is implementation language; client-facing copy should be approval/run authorization.
Cold cloud runs observed at approximately 63s for approved and 171s for corridor; copy does not show elapsed time, selected matches, or cache promise.
Cache language is honest but too technical for primary UI.
Result labels expose formal classifications instead of tactical summaries and principal measurements.

states.recovery_path: Select a different result after loading completes
states.risk: Replay loading is tied to evidence panel, not to the replay surface itself.

states.recovery_path: Select another result or inspect timestamp
states.risk: Corridor overlay lacks a legend and temporal validity.
Honest zero result state is structurally possible but not product-explained.
500 model failures are not translated into a user-safe model unavailable state.

states.visible_copy: Hermes frontier interpretation is not connected; Manual mode remains available
states.risk: Live bootstrap can say HERMES_FRONTIER_READY while model interpret calls fail.
This is one of the stronger areas; tested transitions invalidate dependent artifacts.
Mode change should clear prior interpretation, validation, execution, and replay.

contradictions_and_fail_closed_rules.contradiction: corridor recipe selected while block-shift text remains in the query box
contradictions_and_fail_closed_rules.rule: Changing preset must either update the query placeholder/display copy or show the plan source as recipe-selected and mark the text as advisory only.

contradictions_and_fail_closed_rules.contradiction: Hermes mode showing a manual interpretation
contradictions_and_fail_closed_rules.rule: Changing mode must clear interpretation, validation, confirmation, execution, results, and replay until that mode produces a fresh interpretation; source must be MANUAL_PRESET, HERMES_RECIPE_SELECTION, HERMES_NOVEL_COMPOSITION, DETERMINISTIC_REPAIR, or CAPABILITY_GAP.

contradictions_and_fail_closed_rules.contradiction: bootstrap reports Hermes ready while /api/interpret model mode returns 500
contradictions_and_fail_closed_rules.rule: Convert model invocation exceptions into MODEL_UNAVAILABLE with error id and manual recovery; never return raw 500 to the product surface.

contradictions_and_fail_closed_rules.contradiction: unsupported intent/body-angle language can fall through to selected preset in manual mode
contradictions_and_fail_closed_rules.rule: Unsupported concept detection must run before preset fallback and include semantic gap codes for scanning, body angle, body shape, intent, optimality, and probability; final source must be CAPABILITY_GAP.

contradictions_and_fail_closed_rules.contradiction: plan ready while user has edited query after interpretation
contradictions_and_fail_closed_rules.rule: Any query edit after interpretation marks the plan stale and disables validation until reinterpreted.
